text:
The 2024 Summer Olympics have finally started, and the opening ceremony was held on July 26. People across the world visit Paris to witness this ceremony. On the other hand, celebrities are also coming to watch the Olympics. To mark the occasion, actor Chiranjeevi, along with his family, paid a visit to the inaugural ceremony of the Olympics.

Recently, the megastar posed for pictures holding the Olympic Torch replica. He posted the picture with his wife on his social media handle. The post is currently going viral on the internet.

Taking to X, formerly Twitter, he wrote, “Absolutely thrilled to attend the inaugural of the #PARIS2024 #Olympics. A delightful moment holding the Olympic Torch replica along with Surekha! Wishing every player of our proud Indian Contingent, All the Very Best and the Best Medal Tally ever! Go India!! Jai Hind."

Absolutely thrilled to attend the inaugural of the#PARIS2024#OlympicsA delightful moment holding the Olympic Torch replica along with Surekha !

Wishing each and every player of our proud Indian Contingent, All the Very Best and the Best Medal Tally ever! Go India!!🇮🇳 Jai…pic.twitter.com/fjFWvf9csO

— Chiranjeevi Konidela (@KChiruTweets)July 27, 2024

He also shared other pictures from the celebration on his social media. In the first picture, the actor poses with his family, while in the second one, he is seen with his son, Ram Charan. Both actors are seen posing in front of the Olympic rings. In the caption, he wrote, “Vibing with family at the #Olympics."

Vibing with family at the#Olympics#OlympicVibes#ParisDiaries#PARIS2024@AlwaysRamCharan@upasanakonidela#SurekhaKonidelapic.twitter.com/5Ile7bEqvn— Chiranjeevi Konidela (@KChiruTweets)July 29, 2024

Both the actors took a break from their shooting to enjoy themselves for a few days. Earlier, they toured London, then came to Paris for the Olympics. Earlier, the actor also shared a picture with his family, including his son Ram Charan, his wife Surekha, and his daughter-in-law Upasana. While sharing a post on X, he wrote, “Relishing a serene moment with family and the grand little one Klin Kaara at Hyde Park London, en route our journey to Paris tomorrow! Summer Olympics 24 Inaugural Event Beckons :)"

Relishing a serene moment with family and the grand little one Klin Kaara at Hyde Park London, en route our journey to Paris tomorrow! Summer Olympics 24 Inaugural Event Beckons 🙂pic.twitter.com/bFa31zBh3a

— Chiranjeevi Konidela (@KChiruTweets)July 24, 2024

The megastar made his debut in the industry in 1978 with the film Punadhirallu. The actor is known for his various films, including Rudra Veena, Indra, Tagore, Swayam Krushi, Sye Raa Narasimha Reddy, Stalin, and Gang Leader. Chiranjeevi is currently busy with the film Vishwambhara, directed by Mallidi Vassishta.

Ram Charan has finally wrapped up the shooting of his upcoming project, Game Changer, directed by S Shankar. The shooting of the film started in the second half of 2021, and it also stars Kiara Advani. The makers recently confirmed that the film is scheduled to release during Christmas week.

keywords: 2024 Summer Olympics, Chiranjeevi Olympics, Ram Charan, Paris, Paris Olympics
